items.title: In general, we should treat AI like a utility, not like a being. The more we confuse what AI is the more we will make ourselves go crazy with analogies that will never fully hold true. https://t.co/Ysezok4kUp
items.title_original: In general, we should treat AI like a utility, not like a being. The more we confuse what AI is the more we will make ourselves go crazy with analogies that will never fully hold true. https://t.co/Ysezok4kUp
items.title_en: In general, we should treat AI like a utility, not like a being. The more we confuse what AI is the more we will make ourselves go crazy with analogies that will never fully hold true. https://t.co/Ysezok4kUp
items.title_zh: 一般来说，我们应该将人工智能视为一种实用工具，而不是一种存在。我们越是混淆人工智能是什么，我们就越会因为那些永远不会完全成立的类比而变得疯狂。 https://t.co/Ysezok4kUp
items.title_bilingual: 一般来说，我们应该将人工智能视为一种实用工具，而不是一种存在。我们越是混淆人工智能是什么，我们就越会因为那些永远不会完全成立的类比而变得疯狂。 https://t.co/Ysezok4kUp / In general, we should treat AI like a utility, not like a being.
